title: Retry PR creation for bookforge phase 0:
job:
Retry PR creation for bookforge phase 0:

1. Ensure /bookforge directory exists with all contents
2. Verify no files exist outside /bookforge
3. Create new PR branch following repo conventions
4. Commit changes to new branch
5. Open PR to main

Requirements:
- Branch name must follow job/bookforge-phase0 format
- All files must remain inside /bookforge
- No changes to .github/, .claude/, .pi/, etc.
- Confirm git status --porcelain shows only /bookforge changes
